tabs.heading: Tabs
tabs.text: A basic tabs component with three panels. The first tab is open by default; clicking another tab reveals its content.

html-content.heading: Tabs with HTML content
html-content.text: Tab content supports raw HTML markup, allowing rich content such as headings, lists, and links inside each panel.

many-tabs.heading: Many tabs
many-tabs.text: When the number of tabs exceeds the available container width, the tab header scrolls horizontally to reveal hidden tabs.
